name: search_design_system
description:
Search for design system assets (components, variables, and styles) based on a text query. Returns matching assets from all design libraries. Use this when you need to find specific components, variables (e.g. colors, spacing tokens), or styles from design libraries.
Results are stable within a turn — do not re-issue the same arguments, including when the result is empty.

query.description: Text query to search for design system components

disableCodeConnect.description: Whether to disable Code Connect for search results.

includeComponents.description: Whether to include components in the search results. Defaults to true.

includeVariables.description: Whether to include variables in the search results. Defaults to true.

includeStyles.description: Whether to include styles in the search results. Defaults to true.

includeLibraryKeys.description: Optional list of library keys to restrict the search to. When provided, only results from these libraries are returned. Library keys are returned in previous search results.
